sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The player is at (3, 15). The yellow dot at (3, 15) is now gone! The player collected it! There are now only 3 yellow dots remaining: (9,6), (9,24), (17,15).
So the goal is to collect all the dots by moving the player to each dot's position.
Let me collect all the dots.
Let me collect the remaining yellow dots. From (3, 15), I need to go to (9, 6). That's 6 rows down and 9 columns left. That's 2 DOWN moves and 3 LEFT moves.
